## Bug Type
Select all that apply (maximum 6). If your bug spans more than 6 categories or is highly complex, please open a **Discussion** instead.

- [ ] Sound / Audio
- [ ] Visual / Art
- [ ] Narrative (voicelines, computer interactions, hotbar text)
- [ ] Mechanical / Gameplay
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] General / Other

## Where did you encounter this bug?
- [ ] Playing on itch.io
- [ ] Playing from a cloned repository

## Version
**If you played on itch.io:** Check the bottom of the itch.io page for the current devlog version and paste it here.
> Version:

**If you cloned the repo:** Paste the branch name and commit hash where you encountered the bug.
> Branch:
> Commit hash:

## Browser
Which browser were you playing on?
> e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 115, Safari 17

## Display
What is your screen resolution or aspect ratio?
> e.g. 1920x1080, 16:9, 2560x1440

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

1.

## Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

## Screenshots or Screen Recording
If applicable, attach screenshots or a recording to help explain the bug.

## Additional Context
Any other details that might be relevant.
